blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 7 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of 'Location-specific availability'.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of 'Location-specific availability'.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Location-specific availability', but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the availability of services at specific locations. While the use case mentions the ability to transfer appointments between locations, there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the actual availability of services at each location. This indicates a gap in the evidence related to the specific requirement being tested.
